creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Sunpoet, I've added you to the following teams:

 * Committers
 * Ports
 * Python

You’ve invited Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh to The FreeBSD Project! They’ll be receiving an email shortly. They can also visit https://github.com/freebsd to accept the invitation. 

Once you've accepted the invitation, please

 * Enable Two-Factor Authentication: https://github.com/settings/security
 * Make your membership public: https://github.com/orgs/freebsd/people/sunpoet
